{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220232103692C4F5B00024302308"}"},"total":3042},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7084885798977880832","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我感觉作者大大的文笔还是蛮不错的，希望后面不要烂，一直保持，这是我第一次看一小说，我说就是每一章都看，然后没有跳的，因为除了快穿，我一般看这种重生啊，穿越或者是普通的就很容易跳，因为它有些章节就写的很没意思，所以作者大大特别棒"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1649578529,"group_id":"7075955040589974567","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书荒了，自己试试能不能写出来好看的书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1JeBtvn8mDsydzFZJ0d1MI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ebf90fbcfd2d434e999a7fa91efdf84b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701990&x-signature=IIXrwFkDSLZh4fzs0j%2BBihvEP9A%3D","user_id":"59611260745","user_name":"dghsuxejej"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"59611260745","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7075955040589974567","book_info":{"abstract":"【女主赫敏+成长流+沉浸式体验+电影设定为主+设定会有改动】
　　一次意外，秦宇来到一个新的世界，在这个世界里，有一群人自称巫师，会施展神奇的魔法。
　　而他，一来到这个世界，就获得了一种强大又危险的力量。
　　当然，在学会使用这种力量之前，他必须先寄住在一个叫做赫敏的小姑娘家里，然后，要跟着一个叫做邓布利多的白胡子老头去一座魔法学校学习。
　　神奇的魔法世界，从此开始！
（主角提前一年入学，设定会有改动，介意慎入。hp同人）
本书书名《哈利波特：开局寄住赫敏家》、《哈利波特：这个学长有点强》……番茄的书可以有多个书名，都是同一本书哈。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/95216bb7ace7500dd25a346e15fee6a4","author":"寻找七色花","author_id":"","book_id":"7075955040589974567","book_name":"哈利波特：这个学长有点强","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7075955579554005539","read_count":"20883","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"661533"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"252","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/31fb2bb9dd022761b1ec77f94798643f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301930&x-signature=fxWy6t15JkglySWJtL8wnNgWGyo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1781628168310872","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.42348e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220232103692C4F5B00024302308"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读40分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2423,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2073
